top-tab: color: var(--text-tertiary); font-size: 17px; font-weight: 400; text-shadow: var(--shadow-text); position: relative; padding-bottom: 4px;
top-search: position: absolute; top: 54px; right: 16px; color: #fff; z-index: 10; filter: drop-shadow(var(--shadow-icon));
avatar: width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid #fff; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #25F4EE, #2F2CCE); box-shadow: var(--shadow-icon);
plus-badge: position: absolute; bottom: -8px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 18px; height: 18px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--rose); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
rail-icon: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; color: #fff;
caption-user: font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; text-shadow: var(--shadow-text); margin-bottom: 8px;
caption-text: font-size: 15px; font-weight: 400; color: #fff; text-shadow: var(--shadow-text); line-height: 1.35; margin-bottom: 8px;
music-row: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; color: #fff; text-shadow: var(--shadow-text); overflow: hidden;
music-marquee: font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; animation: marquee 12s linear infinite;
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; filter: drop-shadow(var(--shadow-icon));
